commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh And he overthrew those cities, and all the plain, and all the inhabitants of the cities, and that which grew upon the ground. All the inhabitants, both the body and soul, Jude ver. 7: even the infants would probably die in original sin, as their parents were unbelievers, and careless of applying the proper remedies. (Haydock) The women imitated the men in pride and dissolute morals, so that all deserved to perish. (Menochius) All things; so that even now the environs are barren, and the lake dark and smoking.
